votes.reason: The checklist turns the Corpus V2 gate definition into an inspectable tracker without overstating readiness or changing any historical governance outcomes.
Each gate now distinguishes canon support, missing implementation, and authority boundaries, which reduces ambiguity before any future opening work.
This is a docs-only readiness seam that preserves Corpus V1 history, keeps Corpus V2 gated, and introduces no execution, write, or persistence authority.
